listening.title: Listening: Around the neighbourhood
listening.transcript: There is a supermarket on the corner. There is a hospital next to the school. There is also a park opposite a bank.

questions.question: Where is the hospital?
questions.explanation: "There is a hospital next to the school."

questions.question: The supermarket is on the ___.
questions.explanation: "There is a supermarket on the corner."

listening.title: Listening: Hotel facilities
listening.transcript: The pharmacy is next to the post office, between the café and the bank. The gym is on the second floor, next to the restaurant.

questions.question: Where is the gym?
options: First floor, next to the bank
Second floor, next to the restaurant
questions.correct: Second floor, next to the restaurant
questions.explanation: "The gym is on the second floor, next to the restaurant."
